markdown:
#  How do permissions work for free Procore accounts? 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Background 
When you create your free Procore Account and set up your company information, you can [add other users](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/add-a-user-to-your-free-procore-account) to be a part of your company. You can decide what level of permissions they have in Procore.
##  Answer 
There are 3 different permission levels available for users with a free Procore account:  
| **Member**  | 
  * View other users on the Team page.
  * View projects and bids their company has been invited to.

 |  
| --- | --- |  
| **Team Administrator**  | 
  * View other users on the Team page.
  * View projects and bids their company has been invited to.
  * Manage company settings.

 |  
| **System Administrator**  | 
  * View other users on the Team page.
  * View projects and bids their company has been invited to.
  * Manage company settings.
  * Add and invite users.
  * Edit user information and permissions.
  * Deactivate or reactivate a user.

 |  
## See Also

title: How do permissions work for free Procore accounts?
description: An overview of the permission levels that exist within Procore Construction Network accounts.
